name: accesstrip
description: AccessTrip — AI trip-orchestration for disabled travelers (hackathon demo)
comment: Scripts call `node <entrypoint>` directly instead of the .bin shim, because the parent folder name contains a ':' which corrupts PATH and breaks local binaries. All tooling (tsx, tsc, vite, eslint, prettier, lefthook) is invoked the same way.

scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.web.json --noEmit
